title: Binary Search
description: Given a sorted array of n integers and a target t, determine if t is present. Use binary search.
inputSpec: First line: n and t. Second line: n sorted integers.

botCodes.code:
n,t=map(int,input().split())
a=list(map(int,input().split()))
lo,hi=0,n-1
found=False
while lo<=hi:
    mid=(lo+hi)//2
    if a[mid]==t:found=True;break
    elif a[mid]<t:lo=mid+1
    else:hi=mid-1
print('YES' if found else 'NO')

#include<stdio.h>
int main(){int n,t;scanf("%d %d",&n,&t);int a[100001];for(int i=0;i<n;i++)scanf("%d",&a[i]);int lo=0,hi=n-1;while(lo<=hi){int m=(lo+hi)/2;if(a[m]==t){puts("YES");return 0;}else if(a[m]<t)lo=m+1;else hi=m-1;}puts("NO");}

let()=let n=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id and t=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in let a=Array.init n(fun _->Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id) in let lo=ref 0 and hi=ref(n-1) and found=ref false in while !lo <= !hi&&not !found do let m=(!lo + !hi)/2 in if a.(m)=t then found:=true else if a.(m)<t then lo:=m+1 else hi:=m-1 done;print_endline(if !found then"YES" else"NO")
